summary: All four requirements are implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is covered by TransactionEntryForm.tsx using step='0.01' and parseFloat. REQ-2 is covered by AddCustomerModal.tsx using step='0.01' and parseFloat. REQ-3 is covered by backend/main.mo changing all numeric fields to Float and backend/migration.mo providing migration support. REQ-4 is covered by useTransactionCalculations.ts using parseFloat throughout. No hallucinated features were detected beyond a migration module which is a reasonable supporting artifact for REQ-3.
